overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game, showing a narrow dirt path surrounded by grass and dense trees with very low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path, illuminating the ground ahead with a flashlight while moving through the dark forest

entered.detail: unpaved brown dirt trail winding through the forest floor, illuminated by the flashlight beam
tall green grass growing alongside the left edge of the dirt path
tall green grass growing alongside the right edge of the dirt path
dense dark silhouette of trees forming the left boundary of the trail
dense dark silhouette of trees forming the right boundary of the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera moves continuously forward along a narrow dirt trail through a pitch-black forest. A flashlight beam illuminates the path ahead, revealing grassy verges on both sides and the dark silhouettes of dense trees lining the route. The environment is completely empty of other characters or vehicles, creating an isolated atmosphere as the viewer progresses steadily through the natural terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a pitch-black forest, maintaining a sense of deep isolation. It begins by advancing along a narrow dirt trail, where a single flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal the immediate path. As the camera progresses, the light catches the grassy verges on both sides and the looming silhouettes of dense trees that line the route. The scene remains focused on this steady trek through the natural terrain, with the surrounding void emphasizing the emptiness of the environment.
